problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Neuroinflammation. Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
